description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent hip roof and a well-maintained front lawn. The facade includes a central entrance flanked by symmetrical windows, and a small porch area is visible at the front. The side and rear yards are landscaped with trees, shrubs, and a paved driveway leading to a garage or carport. Palm trees and other greenery enhance the outdoor spaces, while the rear section includes a patio or garden area. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the lush green lawns and foliage. The overall design is compact, with a focus on outdoor living and curb appeal.
description: A single-story hip-roof bungalow with a central entrance, symmetrical windows, landscaped front and rear yards, and a small porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, front lawn, and a large tree near the walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hip roof, extended windows, and landscaped side yard with palm trees and a patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio, garage or carport, and additional greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, more windows, and the transition between the front and rear yards.
